title: disporopsis aspersa
intro: Disporopsis aspersa, also known as the Chinese mayapple or lesser mayapple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This perennial plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Disporopsis aspersa include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be dried and consumed as a powder or capsule.
